---
title: "`quartable` — Quarto extension"
subtitle: "Column spans · row spans · midrules · clines · vertical lines · per-cell alignment"
filters:
  - quartable/quartable
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: false
---

`quartable` extends Markdown pipe tables with constructs that Pandoc
does not support natively, with a single source feeding HTML, Reveal.js
and PDF/LaTeX. See the [README on GitHub](https://github.com/zinc75/quarto-quartable#readme)
for the full syntax reference and compatibility matrix.

## Live demos

The same set of features is rendered in three formats below. Each
example shows the **markdown source** above its **rendered output**,
so the deck doubles as a feature reference.

- [HTML demo](test_quartable.html) — full reference with code blocks
- [PDF demo](test_quartable.pdf) — the same content rendered to LaTeX/PDF
- [Reveal.js slides](test_reveal_quartable.html) — slide-format demo

## Quick install

```bash
quarto add zinc75/quarto-quartable
```

Then enable in your document's YAML front matter:

```yaml
filters:
  - quartable
```

## Quick example

```markdown
| Group           | Item | Score |
|-----------------|------|------:|
| ===             |      |       |
| [Group A]{rs=3} | x1   |  5.2  |
| ^               | x2   |  4.8  |
| ^               | x3   |  6.1  |
| ===             |      |       |
| [Group B]{rs=2} | y1   | 20.0  |
| ^               | y2   | 19.4  |
```

| Group           | Item | Score |
|-----------------|------|------:|
| ===             |      |       |
| [Group A]{rs=3} | x1   |  5.2  |
| ^               | x2   |  4.8  |
| ^               | x3   |  6.1  |
| ===             |      |       |
| [Group B]{rs=2} | y1   | 20.0  |
| ^               | y2   | 19.4  |

## Project links

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/zinc75/quarto-quartable)
- [Changelog](https://github.com/zinc75/quarto-quartable/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md)
- [Contributing guide](https://github.com/zinc75/quarto-quartable/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [Issues](https://github.com/zinc75/quarto-quartable/issues)

Released under the [MIT License](https://github.com/zinc75/quarto-quartable/blob/main/LICENSE).
